posts.title: 时间戳解析问题
posts.slug: 踩坑/前端/通用/时间戳解析问题
posts.text: 时间戳解析问题 最近遇到个问题 后端传递时间戳后，前端无法解析 怎么一回事呢？ 先说结论，将时间戳从字符串转为整形 const parseDate = () => { let timestamp = '1695040213980'; let date = new Date(timestamp); console.log('date:', date); let year = date.getFullYear(); console.log('year:', year);} 后来查了一些博客，发现写法中的问题 改为如下写法即可 const parseDate = () => { let timestamp = 1695040213980; let date = new Date(timestamp); console.log('date:', date); let year = date.getFullYear(); console.log('year:', year);} 将字符串转为int型的方法 parseInt(time)

posts.title: 第一篇文章
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: 组件通信-父传子
posts.slug: 前端/react/组件通信/组件通信-父传子
posts.text: 组件通信-父传子import React from "react";/** * 子组件 */function ChildrenFun(props: { msg: string, changeMsg:()=>void}) { return ( <> <span>这里是子组件</span> <span>{props.msg}</span> <button onClick={props.changeMsg}>点击</button> </> )}/** * 父组件 */class Home extends React.Component { state = { userInfo: { username: 'admin', password: '123456' } } sendMsg = (username: string, password: string) => { console.log("传递过来的参数--账号:%s 密码:%s", username, password); } changeInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => { const {name, value} = e.target; // console.log("name:%s,value:%s",name,value); this.setState({ userInfo: { ...this.state.userInfo, [name]: value } }) } changeMessage = ():void => { this.setState({ userInfo: { username: this.state.userInfo.username + '==', password: this.state.userInfo.password + '--', } }) } render() { return ( <> <form action=""> 账号:<input type="text" value={this.state.userInfo.username} name="username" onChange={(e) => this.changeInput(e)}/><br/> 密码:<input type="text" value={this.state.userInfo.password} name="password" onChange={(e) => this.changeInput(e)}/><br/> </form> <button onClick={() => this.sendMsg(this.state.userInfo.username, this.state.userInfo.password)}> 打印 </button> <br/> <ChildrenFun msg={this.state.userInfo.username} changeMsg={this.changeMessage}/> <br/> </> ) }}export default Home;
